basic_details.job_title: NAM Speech Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Ayush Mission (NAM) Speech Therapist Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website www.nam.kerala.gov.in. Has been announced through the NAM Speech Therapist Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 40 years of age who have a BASLP (Bachelor of Audiology & Speech Language Pathology) are eligible to apply for this Speech Therapist vacancy. The offline application process for NAM Speech Therapist Recruitment 2026 has started immediately and will remain open until 23 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and submit their applications throu

qualification.education_qualification: BASLP (Bachelor of Audiology & Speech Language Pathology)
qualification.details: BASLP (Bachelor of Audiology & Speech Language Pathology)

selection_process: Written Test (if more than 20 applicants) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NAM Speech Therapist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nam.kerala.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NAM Speech Therapist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the National Ayush Mission Speech Therapist position is 23rd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Speech Therapist post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Speech Therapist position, candidates must possess a BASLP (Bachelor of Audiology & Speech Language Pathology) degree.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Speech Therapist post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Speech Therapist position?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a written test if more than 20 applicants are received, followed by an interview. The final selection will be based on performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Speech Therapist role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Speech Therapist position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 31,300.

faq.question: Q7. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications for the NAM Speech Therapist recruitment must be submitted offline by post, as per the instructions in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the National Ayush Mission, Kerala: www.nam.kerala.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, under the National Ayush Mission.
